GeneralDescription.SourceString: Cold-blooded heir to a venomous dynasty.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Cold-blooded heir to a venomous dynasty.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The mysterious heir to the Hesk fortune is perhaps the last elite still defying The Society's reign. Silas Hesk is willing to quietly assist The Underground's efforts. Just don't ask about the snake.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The mysterious heir to the Hesk fortune is perhaps the last elite still defying The Society's reign. Silas Hesk is willing to quietly assist The Underground's efforts. Just don't ask about the snake.
